notes: This migration unit targets a Java desktop shell module. Browser page-load and Core Web Vitals metrics are not applicable.
Baseline commit c8912c266 has no shell test sources (:winmerge-shell:test NO-SOURCE), so test-time and artifact-size deltas are inflated by newly introduced migrated functionality.
All >10% deltas were reported to Engineering Manager before QA clearance as required.

violations.reason: Baseline had no shell test sources; candidate executes 13 new migration tests.
Baseline jar was near-empty pre-migration; candidate now contains migrated shell integration implementation.
